channel.title: Cold Email on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy
channel.description: Recent content in Cold Email on The Age of AI with Alan McCarthy

item.title: How to Write Cold Emails That Get Replies with AI Templates
item.description: You’ve spent hours crafting the perfect cold email, only to get… crickets. No replies, no interest, nothing. As a solopreneur or small business owner, you don’t have time to waste on outreach that doesn’t work. You need emails that grab attention, build trust, and get responses—fast. The problem isn’t just your writing; it’s the strategy behind it. Cold emailing is a numbers game, but if your message feels generic or pushy, you’re dead in the water.

item.title: How to Write Cold Emails That Get Responses as a Solopreneur
item.description: How to Write Cold Emails That Get Responses as a Solopreneur You’re a solopreneur or small business owner, and you’ve got a great service or product to offer. But here’s the problem: you send out cold emails, and… crickets. No replies, no interest, just a sinking feeling that you’re wasting your time. Cold outreach feels like shouting into the void, especially when you’re juggling everything else on your plate. I’ve been there, and I know how frustrating it is to pour effort into emails that go nowhere.
